description_long: This is a single-serve plastic cup of Milkaut yogurt with cereals, featuring a sealed foil lid. The cup is predominantly white with blue and yellow accents, and the front displays the Milkaut logo in blue and green, along with product information such as 'con cereales entero' and 'vainilla'. The lid is dark gray with a printed label that matches the branding on the cup, and a pull tab is visible for easy opening. Nutritional information and additional product details are printed on the side in blue text. The cup is slightly tapered, wider at the top and narrowing towards the base, typical of yogurt packaging. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed for single-use consumption.
description: A white and blue Milkaut yogurt cup with a foil lid, featuring cereal and vanilla flavor branding and nutritional details.
description_view_0: The side of the cup shows the Milkaut logo, product name, and a partial view of the cereal and vanilla imagery, with the foil lid's pull tab visible.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the Milkaut logo, 'con cereales entero' text, and a clear image of the cereal and vanilla, with the yellow flavor label most prominent.
description_view_2: This side view shows mostly the plain white surface of the cup, with only a small portion of the label and branding visible.
description_view_3: The angled view displays both the Milkaut logo and the nutritional information panel, as well as the foil lid's pull tab.
attribute_brand_logo: The Milkaut logo is visible on the front and side of the cup, featuring blue and green text on a white background.
attribute_flavor_indication: The word 'vainilla' and an image of cereal with milk indicate vanilla flavor with cereals.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information is visible on the side of the cup, including calories and other values.
